    "HasA": [
      "それは、乗ったままの状態を試みるライダーがいます。",
      "それは、ライダーを振り落とそうとする暴れる雄牛がいます。",
      "それは、パフォーマンスに基づいた採点システムがあります。",
      "それは、ライダーと雄牛を採点する審判がいます。",
      "それは、雄牛の前の脚の後ろに結ばれたブルロープがあります。",
      "それは、ライダーが片手だけを使用するという要件があります。",
      "それは、採点されるライディングの8秒間の期間があります。",
      "それは、ライダーを支援するブルファイターがいます。",
      "それは、雄牛が出てくる小さな囲いであるバッキングシュートがあります。",
      "それは、雄牛のための出口シュートがあります。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは、ライダーが8秒間雄牛に乗り続けることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは、雄牛がライダーを振り落とそうとすることによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは、ブルロープの使用によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは、ライダーが片手だけを使用することによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは、採点システムによって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは、ブルファイターの関与によって特徴づけられます。"
    ],
    "HeldIn": [
      "それは、ネバダ州ラスベガスで開催されました。",
      "それは、ダラス・フォートワース複合都市圏で開催されました。"
    ],
    "HeldOn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "それは、馬術、牧畜、闘牛の技術に関するメキシコの競技に影響を受けました。",
      "それは、チャレアダに影響を受けました。",
      "それは、伝統的な土着のゲームやエクササイズに影響を受けました。",
      "それは、アングロとヒスパニックの牧場労働者に影響を受けました。",
      "それは、ヒスパニックの技術と伝統に影響を受けました。",
      "それは、ワイルドウェストショーに影響を受けました。"

      "それは、競技スポーツです。"
    ],
    "KnownAs": [
      "それは、「スポーツにおける最も危険な8秒間」として知られています。"
    ],
    "KnownFor": [
      "それは、ライダーが暴れる雄牛に乗り続けようとすることで知られています。",
      "それは、その危険な性質で知られています。",
      "それは、8秒間のライディング要件で知られています。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "ManufacturedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "MemberOf": [
      "それは、プロフェッショナル・ブルライダーズ（PBR）組織のメンバーです。",

      "それは、アメリカ合衆国で起こりました。",
      "それは、カナダで起こりました。",

About: It is about a rodeo sport involving a rider on a bucking bull.
Affects: It affects the rider's ability to stay mounted.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the category of rodeo sports.
CausedBy: It is caused by the bull trying to buck off the rider.
ConsistsOf: It consists of a rider attempting to stay on a bucking bull.
HasA: It has a rider attempting to stay mounted.
It has a bucking bull trying to dislodge the rider.
It has a scoring system based on performance.
It has judges who score the rider and the bull.
It has a bull rope tied behind the bull's forelegs.
It has a requirement for the rider to use only one hand.
It has a duration of eight seconds for a scored ride.
It has bullfighters who assist the rider.
It has a bucking chute from which the bull exits.
It has an exit chute for the bull.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the rider staying on the bull for eight seconds.
It is characterized by the bull's attempts to buck off the rider.
It is characterized by the use of a bull rope.
It is characterized by the rider using only one hand.
It is characterized by a scoring system.
It is characterized by the involvement of bullfighters.
HeldIn: It was held in Las Vegas, Nevada.
It was held in the Dallas–Fort Worth metroplex.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Mexican contests of equestrian, ranching and bullfighting skills.
It was influenced by traditional native games and exercises.
It was influenced by Anglo and Hispanic ranch hands.
It was influenced by Hispanic techniques and traditions.
It was influenced by Wild West Shows.
KnownAs: It is known as the "most dangerous eight seconds in sports."
KnownFor: It is known for riders attempting to stay on bucking bulls.
It is known for its dangerous nature.
It is known for the eight-second ride requirement.
MemberOf: It is a member of the Professional Bull Riders (PBR) organization.
It is a member of the Cowboys' Turtle Association (CTA).
It is a member of the Rodeo Cowboys Association (RCA).
It is a member of the Professional Rodeo Cowboys Association (PRCA).
OccurredIn: It occurred in Mexico.
It occurred in the United States.
It occurred in Canada.
It occurred in Belize.
It occurred in Guatemala.
It occurred in El Salvador.
It occurred in Honduras.
It occurred in Nicaragua.
It occurred in Costa Rica.
It occurred in Panama.
OriginatedIn: It originated in the United States.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Canadian brothers Earl and Weldon Bascom.
It was produced by Jake Lybbert.
It was produced by Waldo Ross.
UsedAs: It is used as a sport.
It is used as a competition.
UsedFor: It is used for showcasing equestrian skills.
UsedIn: It is used in bull riding organizations.
It is used in PBR events.
It is used in PRCA ProRodeo.
It is used in Xtreme Bulls events.
UsedTo: It is used to test a rider's skill and endurance.
It is used to entertain spectators.
